task-11: Verify vim.uv.fs_open implementation
Hi! I had a syntax error with bitwise OR operator. Can you fix it by using bit.bor instead of | for the flags in save()? Or release the file so I can fix it?

fix(state): use bit.bor for file open flags in vim.uv.fs_open Replace bitwise OR operator | with bit.bor() for Lua 5.1 compatibility when combining uv.constants.O_WRONLY, O_CREAT, and O_TRUNC flags. Task: task-11

Fixed vim.uv.fs_open implementation in state.lua by replacing Lua 5.1 incompatible bitwise OR operator (|) with bit.bor() function. The implementation includes: - ERROR_MESSAGES table mapping error codes to human-readable messages (EACCES→"Permission denied", ENOENT→"Directory does not exist", etc.) - vim.uv.fs_open with O_RDONLY flag for load() operations - vim.uv.fs_open with O_WRONLY|O_CREAT|O_TRUNC flags (using bit.bor) for save() operations - Proper file descriptor lifecycle management with vim.uv.fs_close() - Specific error messages instead of generic "could not write" messages All 51 state tests pass successfully.
